what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source JPEG image asset named p-01 in the presentation-15p path, labeling it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, width/height, source, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links.
Width and height are both 0 despite the file being an image/jpeg.
The body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-01.jpg'.
No code symbols are present; symbols[] is empty.
standouts: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record.
It is explicitly tagged as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'.
The asset is identified by a channel-scoped address and a blob hash.
conventions: Follows a ledger-style metadata schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, and created fields.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
concerns: Zero width and height suggest missing image dimension extraction or an unprocessed placeholder.
The links array is empty, so the asset is not yet connected to other ledger records.
The blob hash cannot be verified from the contents of this file alone.
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source JPEG slide, tagged as ground-truth but missing image dimensions and outbound links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What is the full content of the 'presentation-15p' set?
Is the blob hash intended to be verified against the actual image file?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a source design ground-truth metadata record matches the content, but the record is incomplete because it lacks image dimensions and any links to related records.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register an original presentation slide image in a ledger so it can be located, attributed, and used as a canonical source during later design or code fusion.
contribution: Provides a stable identity and provenance metadata for a design-source image asset, including a blob reference, authorship timestamp, and source label, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for a design-source JPEG image named p-01 in the presentation-15p path, tagged as source design ground-truth with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and identify an original presentation slide image as ground-truth source material within a design channel ledger.
